summary: Package-Based Advertising System testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working (18/18 tests passed). Frontend advertiser dashboard with 3-step wizard working. Admin ad approval page with Package-Based Ad Flow explanation working.
passed_tests: Small Area package: KES 300, 3 days, constituency scope - ✅
Large Area package: KES 1,000, 7 days, county scope - ✅
Wide Area package: KES 3,500, 14 days, national scope - ✅
Advertiser login fails with wrong password - ✅
Admin login fails with wrong password - ✅
Advertiser can get their ads list - ✅
Advertiser dashboard loads with 3 advertising packages - ✅
Status flow (Pending Review → Approved → Paid → Active) visible - ✅
Price info text visible (price from package selection) - ✅
seed_data_creation: Ad packages seeded via /api/seed endpoint: Small Area (KES 300), Large Area (KES 1,000), Wide Area (KES 3,500)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Package-Based Advertising System fully tested. 3 ad packages available: Small Area (KES 300/3 days/constituency), Large Area (KES 1,000/7 days/county), Wide Area (KES 3,500/14 days/national). Advertiser dashboard has 3-step wizard for ad creation. Admin ad approval page shows Package-Based Ad Flow with status progression. M-Pesa STK Push is MOCKED (simulated when credentials not configured).

mocked_apis.M-Pesa STK Push: Simulated when MPESA credentials not configured in backend/.env
